step_rationale: Generates ceramides from sphingomyelin; ceramides promote endothelial dysfunction and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: SMPD1-catalyzed ceramide production from lipoprotein lipids drives endothelial activation and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Lipidomics reveals the dysregulated ceramide metabolism in oxidized low-density lipoprotein-induced macrophage-derived foam cell.
